zh.lifeSummary: 當Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond於1165年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯時，他的父親King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond23歲，母親Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster11歲。他和Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy至少有5個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1242年享年77歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克利默里克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond于1165年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯时，他的父亲King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond23岁，母亲Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster11岁。他和Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy至少有5个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1242年享年77岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克利默里克。

nameMeanings.name: Ua
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Teochew form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Briain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Brittain  .

variants.name: Brittain
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Bretagne, Bretaign(e) ‘Brittany’. Some of the modern forms are from the Middle English Brytane, Brittan ‘Breton’; compare Breton .

nameMeanings.name: Donnchadh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Gaelic: compound of Old Celtic donn ‘brown’ + chadh ‘chief’ or ‘noble’.

variants.name: Duncan
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Donnchadh , also used among people without Scottish connections. This was the name of a 7th-century Scottish saint (abbot of Iona) and two medieval kings of Scotland. The final ‐n in the Anglicized form seems to be the result of confusion with the Gaelic word ceann ‘head’ in the Latinized form Duncanus. Compare Irish Donagh .

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond was born in 1165, in Ennis, County Clare, Ireland, his father, King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond, was 23 and his mother, Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster, was 11. He had at least 5 sons and 2 daughters with Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy. He died in 1242, at the age of 77, and was buried in Limerick, County Limerick, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond est né en 1165, à Ennis, County Clare, Irlande, son père, King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster, avait 11 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles avec Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy. Il est décédé en 1242, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Limerick, County Limerick, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond 1165 in Ennis, County Clare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond 23 und seine Mutter Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster 11. Er hatte mit Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1242 im Alter von 77 Jahren und wurde in Limerick, County Limerick, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond è nato il nel 1165 nel Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, il suo padre, King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster, aveva 11 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie con Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy. Morì nel 1242, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Limerick, County Limerick, Irlanda.

ja.Limerick, County Limerick, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ リメリックリメリック
ja.lifeSummary: Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomondが1165年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスで生まれた時，父King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomondは23歳，母Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinsterは11歳であった。彼はSabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedyとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1242年に77歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ リメリックリメリックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond(이)가 1165년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster(은)는 11세였다. 그는 Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1242년 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 라임릭에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond nasceu em 1165, em Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, seu pai, King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster, tinha 11 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas com Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy. Ele faleceu em 1242, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Limerick, County Limerick, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond родился в 1165 г. в местности эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster, 11. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери от Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy. Он умер в 1242 г. в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности лимирикк, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Donnchadh Cairprech Ua Briain King of Thomond nació en 1165, en Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, su papá, King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster, tenía 11 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas con Sabia dau of Donogh O'Kennedy. Murió en 1242, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Limerick, County Limerick, Irlanda.
